name: COMIC! - VR reading app for books and comics

reviews.review_description: This app is literally a rip off of the app called Biblio. not sure if it's the same company or just someone copying their work. they didn't even change the description. but just get Biblio instead. It's less buggy and actually works.

One of the most frustrating apps on this platform. No support docs for instructions on how to use it. 

a floating library menu that you cannot access. Sadly as of now it is the only reader on meta use your Kindle instead of even your cell phone either will work better than this
After loading you see floating menu and it is not possible to interact in any way. Inside the app it is even called "unity demo". This is clearly unfinished and/or broken.
